buzdolabı.text: buz (ice) + dolap (cupboard); note the vowel harmony — a fridge.

kütüphane.text: From Arabic/Persian; front vowels ü-ü-a-e — a library.

kelebek.text: Even e-e-e vowel harmony, soft and light — a butterfly.

ayçiçeği.text: ay (moon) + çiçek (flower); the soft ğ never sounds — a sunflower.

kaplumbağa.text: The soft ğ only lengthens the vowel — a turtle.

üniversite.text: From French; front-vowel harmony ü-i-e-i-e — a university.

bilgisayar.text: bilgi (knowledge) + sayar (counter) — a computer, coined in Turkish.

doğumgünü.text: doğum (birth) + gün (day), with vowel harmony — a birthday.
